zh.Wethersfield Hartford, Connecticut, Brit: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德

zh.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut: 美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Susannah Bowen於1696年出生在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德時，她的父親Josiah Bowen27歲，母親Susanna Clark24歲。她於1717年4月17日與William Hurlbut在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1756年9月22日在她的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susannah Bowen于1696年出生在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德时，她的父亲Josiah Bowen27岁，母亲Susanna Clark24岁。她于1717年4月17日与William Hurlbut在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1756年9月22日在她的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Bowen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Owain ‘son of Owain’ (see Owen ), with fused patronymic marker (a)p, which is normally voiced before a vowel.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhacháin ‘descendant of Buadhachán’, a diminutive of Buadhach ‘victorious’ (see Bohan ).
Irish: used to ‘translate’ Ó Cnáimhín ‘descendant of Cnáimhín’, a personal name meaning ‘little bone’ or ‘little body’, see Nevin 1.

variants.name: Bowan
meanings: Irish: variant of Bowen 2, from Gaelic Ó Buadhacháin ‘descendant of Buadhachán’.

variants.name: Bowens
meanings: Welsh, Irish (Mayo), and English: variant of Bowen , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Owen
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Owain, from Latin Eugenius (see Eugene ). This Welsh personal name is cognate with Old Irish Eogán, see 2 and 3.
Scottish and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Eoghain ‘son of Eoghan’. See McEwen .
Irish: from Ó hEoghain, ‘descendant of Eoghan’. See Ewen .

nameMeanings.name: Susannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Susanna  , in  2003  the most common in this group of names. It is the form of the name used in the Old Testament. The tale of Susannah, wife of  Joachim , and the elders who falsely accused her of adultery, is to be found in the apocryphal book that bears her name, and was popular in the Middle Ages and later.

en.lifeSummary: When Susannah Bowen was born in 1696, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States, her father, Josiah Bowen, was 27 and her mother, Susanna Clark, was 24. She married William Hurlbut on 17 April 1717, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 22 September 1756, in her hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susannah Bowen est née en 1696, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis, son père, Josiah Bowen, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Susanna Clark, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé William Hurlbut le 17 avril 1717, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 septembre 1756, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Susannah Bowen 1696 in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Josiah Bowen 27 und ihre Mutter Susanna Clark 24. Sie hat am 17. April 1717 in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten William Hurlbut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. September 1756 im Alter von 60 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Susannah Bowen è nata il nel 1696 nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Josiah Bowen, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Susanna Clark, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato William Hurlbut il 17 aprile 1717, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 22 settembre 1756, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Susannah Bowenが1696年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで生まれた時，父Josiah Bowenは27歳，母Susanna Clarkは24歳であった。1717年4月17日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドでWilliam Hurlbutと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1756年9月22日に故郷で60歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.Wethersfield Hartford, Connecticut, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드
ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드
ko.lifeSummary: Susannah Bowen(이)가 1696년 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Josiah Bowen(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Susanna Clark(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1717년 4월 17일 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 William Hurlbut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1756년 9월 22일 그녀의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susannah Bowen nasceu em 1696, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Josiah Bowen, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Clark, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com William Hurlbut em 17 de abril de 1717, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1756, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susannah Bowen родилась в 1696 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Josiah Bowen было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Susanna Clark, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Hurlbut 17 апреля 1717 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 22 сентября 1756 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Susannah Bowen nació en 1696, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, su papá, Josiah Bowen, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Susanna Clark, tenía 24 años. Se casó con William Hurlbut el 17 de abril de 1717, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1756, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
